title: dryopteris saxatilis
intro: Dryopteris saxatilis, also known as saxatile fern or rock fern, is a species of fern in the Dryopteris genus. It is native to Europe, North Africa, and Asia, and is often found growing on rocky outcrops and stone walls. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the saxatile fern can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
